description: This file defines a Tooltip class for Bootstrap, implementing tooltip functionality with configuration options, event handling, and integration with Popper.js for positioning. It includes constants, class methods, and plugin registration for jQuery.

classes.name: Tooltip
classes.description: A class extending BaseComponent that provides tooltip functionality, including show, hide, toggle, dispose, and configuration management, with support for Popper.js positioning and event handling.

methods.name: enable
methods.description: Enables the tooltip.

methods.name: disable
methods.description: Disables the tooltip.

methods.name: toggleEnabled
methods.description: Toggles the enabled state of the tooltip.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the tooltip visibility.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the tooltip instance, removing event listeners and DOM elements.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the tooltip if conditions are met.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the tooltip if it is currently shown.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates the position of the tooltip.

methods.name: _isWithContent
methods.description: Checks if the tooltip has content to display.

methods.name: _getTipElement
methods.description: Retrieves or creates the tooltip DOM element.

methods.name: _createTipElement
methods.description: Creates the tooltip DOM element with content.

methods.name: setContent
methods.description: Sets new content for the tooltip.

methods.name: _getTemplateFactory
methods.description: Retrieves or creates a TemplateFactory for tooltip content.

methods.name: _getContentForTemplate
methods.description: Prepares content for the tooltip template.

methods.name: _getTitle
methods.description: Retrieves the tooltip title.

methods.name: _initializeOnDelegatedTarget
methods.description: Initializes tooltip on a delegated target event.

methods.name: _isAnimated
methods.description: Checks if the tooltip should animate.

methods.name: _isShown
methods.description: Checks if the tooltip is currently visible.

methods.name: _createPopper
methods.description: Creates a Popper instance for positioning.

methods.name: _getOffset
methods.description: Calculates the offset for positioning.

methods.name: _resolvePossibleFunction
methods.description: Executes if argument is a function, otherwise returns value.

methods.name: _getPopperConfig
methods.description: Generates configuration object for Popper.js.

methods.name: _setListeners
methods.description: Sets event listeners based on trigger configuration.

methods.name: _fixTitle
methods.description: Fixes the title attribute for accessibility.

methods.name: _enter
methods.description: Handles mouseenter or focusin events to show tooltip.

methods.name: _leave
methods.description: Handles mouseleave or focusout events to hide tooltip.

methods.name: _setTimeout
methods.description: Sets a timeout for delayed show/hide.

methods.name: _isWithActiveTrigger
methods.description: Checks if any trigger is active.

methods.name: _getConfig
methods.description: Merges data attributes and options into configuration.

methods.name: _configAfterMerge
methods.description: Post-processes merged configuration.

methods.name: _getDelegateConfig
methods.description: Prepares configuration for delegated triggers.

methods.name: _disposePopper
methods.description: Destroys the Popper instance and removes tooltip DOM.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Static method for jQuery plugin interface.
